{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/StationpediaAscended/mod/src/UI/TocLinkHandler.cs)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/StationpediaAscended/mod/src/UI/TocLinkHandler.cs)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "using System;\nusing System.Collections;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing Assets.Scripts.UI;\nusing TMPro;\nusing UnityEngine;\nusing UnityEngine.EventSystems;\nusing UnityEngine.UI;\n\nnamespace StationpediaAscended.UI\n{\n    /// &lt;summary&gt;\n    /// Handles clicks on Table of Contents links and scrolls to the target section\n    /// &lt;/summary&gt;\n    public class TocLinkHandler : MonoBehaviour, IPointerClickHandler\n    {\n        public TextMeshProUGUI TextComponent;\n        \n        // Registry of section IDs to their category GameObjects\n        private static Dictionary&lt;string, RectTransform&gt; _sectionRegistry = new Dictionary&lt;string, RectTransform&gt;();\n        private static Dictionary&lt;string, StationpediaCategory&gt; _categoryRegistry = new Dictionary&lt;string, StationpediaCategory&gt;();\n        \n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\n        /// Register a section for TOC navigation\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\n        public static void RegisterSection(string tocId, RectTransform rectTransform, StationpediaCategory category = null)\n        {\n            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(tocId)) return;\n            _sectionRegistry[tocId] = rectTransform;\n            if (category != null)\n                _categoryRegistry[tocId] = category;\n        }\n        \n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\n        /// Clear all registered sections (call when page changes)\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\n        public static void ClearRegistry()\n        {\n            _sectionRegistry.Clear();\n            _categoryRegistry.Clear();\n        }\n        \n        public void OnPointerClick(PointerEventData eventData)\n        {\n            if (TextComponent == null) return;\n            \n            // Find which link was clicked\n            int linkIndex = TMP_TextUtilities.FindIntersectingLink(TextComponent, Input.mousePosition, null);\n            if (linkIndex == -1) return;\n            \n            TMP_LinkInfo linkInfo = TextComponent.textInfo.linkInfo[linkIndex];\n            string linkId = linkInfo.GetLinkID();\n            \n            // Check if it's a TOC link (prefixed with \"toc_\")\n            if (linkId.StartsWith(\"toc_\"))\n            {\n                string sectionId = linkId.Substring(4); // Remove \"toc_\" prefix\n                ScrollToSection(sectionId);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        private void ScrollToSection(string sectionId)\n        {\n            if (!_sectionRegistry.TryGetValue(sectionId, out var targetRect))\n            {\n                ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] TOC target not found: {sectionId}\");\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            // Expand the target category if it's collapsed\n            if (_categoryRegistry.TryGetValue(sectionId, out var category))\n            {\n                if (category.Contents != null &amp;&amp; !category.Contents.gameObject.activeSelf)\n                {\n                    category.ToggleContentVisibility();\n                }\n            }\n            \n            // Start scroll coroutine\n            if (StationpediaAscendedMod.Instance != null)\n            {\n                StationpediaAscendedMod.Instance.StartCoroutine(ScrollToTargetCoroutine(targetRect));\n            }\n        }\n        \n        private IEnumerator ScrollToTargetCoroutine(RectTransform target)\n        {\n            // Wait for layout to update after potential expand\n            yield return null;\n            yield return null;\n            Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();\n            \n            var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;\n            if (stationpedia == null) yield break;\n            \n            var scrollRect = stationpedia.GetComponentInChildren&lt;ScrollRect&gt;();\n            if (scrollRect == null || scrollRect.content == null) yield break;\n            \n            // Force layout rebuild\n            LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(scrollRect.content);\n            yield return null;\n            \n            // Calculate the target position\n            // Get the target's position relative to the content\n            Vector3[] targetCorners = new Vector3[4];\n            target.GetWorldCorners(targetCorners);\n            \n            Vector3[] contentCorners = new Vector3[4];\n            scrollRect.content.GetWorldCorners(contentCorners);\n            \n            // Calculate normalized scroll position\n            float contentHeight = scrollRect.content.rect.height;\n            float viewportHeight = scrollRect.viewport.rect.height;\n            \n            if (contentHeight &lt;= viewportHeight)\n            {\n                // Content fits in viewport, no scrolling needed\n                yield break;\n            }\n            \n            // Get local position of target within content\n            Vector2 localPoint;\n            RectTransformUtility.ScreenPointToLocalPointInRectangle(\n                scrollRect.content, \n                RectTransformUtility.WorldToScreenPoint(null, target.position),\n                null,\n                out localPoint\n            );\n            \n            // Calculate normalized position (0 = bottom, 1 = top)\n            // We want the target to appear near the top of the viewport\n            float targetY = -localPoint.y - scrollRect.content.rect.height / 2f;\n            float scrollableHeight = contentHeight - viewportHeight;\n            float normalizedY = Mathf.Clamp01(targetY / scrollableHeight);\n            \n            // Animate scroll\n            float startPos = scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition;\n            float targetPos = 1f - normalizedY; // Invert because Unity's scroll is 1=top\n            float duration = 0.3f;\n            float elapsed = 0f;\n            \n            while (elapsed &lt; duration)\n            {\n                elapsed += Time.unscaledDeltaTime;\n                float t = elapsed / duration;\n                // Ease out cubic\n                float eased = 1f - Mathf.Pow(1f - t, 3f);\n                scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition = Mathf.Lerp(startPos, targetPos, eased);\n                yield return null;\n            }\n            \n            scrollRect.verticalNormalizedPosition = targetPos;\n        }\n    }\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;csharp\n\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Load custom icons for expand/collapse buttons from images folder\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private void LoadCustomIcons()\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                // Paths to check for custom icons\r\n                var basePaths = new List&lt;string&gt;();\r\n                \r\n#if DEBUG\r\n                basePaths.Add(@\"C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\StationpediaAscended\\mod\\images\");\r\n#endif\r\n                basePaths.Add(Path.Combine(Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location) ?? \"\", \"images\"));\r\n                basePaths.Add(Path.Combine(BepInEx.Paths.BepInExRootPath, \"scripts\", \"images\"));\r\n                \r\n                foreach (var basePath in basePaths)\r\n                {\r\n                    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) || !Directory.Exists(basePath)) continue;\r\n                    \r\n                    string expandedPath = Path.Combine(basePath, \"icon_expanded.png\");\r\n                    string collapsedPath = Path.Combine(basePath, \"icon_collapsed.png\");\r\n                    \r\n                    if (File.Exists(expandedPath) &amp;&amp; _iconExpanded == null)\r\n                    {\r\n                        _iconExpanded = LoadSpriteFromFile(expandedPath);\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    if (File.Exists(collapsedPath) &amp;&amp; _iconCollapsed == null)\r\n                    {\r\n                        _iconCollapsed = LoadSpriteFromFile(collapsedPath);\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    if (_iconExpanded != null &amp;&amp; _iconCollapsed != null)\r\n                        break;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Fallback: Use phoenix icon for both states if custom icons not found\r\n                if (_iconExpanded == null &amp;&amp; _customIconSprite != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    _iconExpanded = _customIconSprite;\r\n                }\r\n                if (_iconCollapsed == null &amp;&amp; _customIconSprite != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    _iconCollapsed = _customIconSprite;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                Log?.LogError($\"Error loading custom icons: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Helper to load a sprite from a PNG file\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static Sprite LoadSpriteFromFile(string path)\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                byte[] imageData = File.ReadAllBytes(path);\r\n                Texture2D texture = new Texture2D(2, 2, TextureFormat.RGBA32, false);\r\n                texture.filterMode = FilterMode.Bilinear;\r\n                \r\n                if (ImageConversion.LoadImage(texture, imageData))\r\n                {\r\n                    return Sprite.Create(\r\n                        texture,\r\n                        new Rect(0, 0, texture.width, texture.height),\r\n                        new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f),\r\n                        100f\r\n                    );\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                Log?.LogWarning($\"Failed to load sprite from {path}: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n",
  "textEditContent": "\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Load custom icons for expand/collapse buttons from images folder\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private void LoadCustomIcons()\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                // Paths to check for custom icons\r\n                var basePaths = new List&lt;string&gt;();\r\n                \r\n#if DEBUG\r\n                basePaths.Add(@\"C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\StationpediaAscended\\mod\\images\");\r\n#endif\r\n                basePaths.Add(Path.Combine(Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location) ?? \"\", \"images\"));\r\n                basePaths.Add(Path.Combine(BepInEx.Paths.BepInExRootPath, \"scripts\", \"images\"));\r\n                \r\n                foreach (var basePath in basePaths)\r\n                {\r\n                    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) || !Directory.Exists(basePath)) continue;\r\n                    \r\n                    string expandedPath = Path.Combine(basePath, \"icon_expanded.png\");\r\n                    string collapsedPath = Path.Combine(basePath, \"icon_collapsed.png\");\r\n                    \r\n                    if (File.Exists(expandedPath) &amp;&amp; _iconExpanded == null)\r\n                    {\r\n                        _iconExpanded = LoadSpriteFromFile(expandedPath);\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    if (File.Exists(collapsedPath) &amp;&amp; _iconCollapsed == null)\r\n                    {\r\n                        _iconCollapsed = LoadSpriteFromFile(collapsedPath);\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    if (_iconExpanded != null &amp;&amp; _iconCollapsed != null)\r\n                        break;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Fallback: Use phoenix icon for both states if custom icons not found\r\n                if (_iconExpanded == null &amp;&amp; _customIconSprite != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    _iconExpanded = _customIconSprite;\r\n                }\r\n                if (_iconCollapsed == null &amp;&amp; _customIconSprite != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    _iconCollapsed = _customIconSprite;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                Log?.LogError($\"Error loading custom icons: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Helper to load a sprite from a PNG file\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static Sprite LoadSpriteFromFile(string path)\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                byte[] imageData = File.ReadAllBytes(path);\r\n                Texture2D texture = new Texture2D(2, 2, TextureFormat.RGBA32, false);\r\n                texture.filterMode = FilterMode.Bilinear;\r\n                \r\n                if (ImageConversion.LoadImage(texture, imageData))\r\n                {\r\n                    return Sprite.Create(\r\n                        texture,\r\n                        new Rect(0, 0, texture.width, texture.height),\r\n                        new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f),\r\n                        100f\r\n                    );\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                Log?.LogWarning($\"Failed to load sprite from {path}: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }",

}

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="copilot_readFile">

MonitorCategoryState(StationpediaCategory category, IconAnimator animator)\r\n        {\r\n            if (category == null || animator == null) yield break;\r\n            \r\n            bool? lastState = null;\r\n            while (category != null &amp;&amp; category.Contents != null)\r\n            {\r\n                bool isExpanded = category.Contents.gameObject.activeSelf;\r\n                if (lastState != isExpanded)\r\n                {\r\n                    lastState = isExpanded;\r\n                    animator.SetState(isExpanded, lastState.HasValue); // Animate only after string safeTocId = detail.tocId ?? detail.title?.Replace(\" \", \"_\") ?? $\"section_{depth}\";\r\n                nestedCategory.gameObject.name = $\"NestedCategory_{safeTocId}\";\r\n                \r\n                // Set title with depth-based coloring\r\n                string titleColor = depth == 0 ? \"#FF7A18\" : (depth == 1 ? \"#E09030\" : \"#C08040\");\r\n                nestedCategory.Title.text = $\"&lt;color={titleColor}&gt;{detail.title}&lt;/color&gt;\";\r\n                \r\n                // Apply custom icons\r\n                ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(nestedCategory);\r\n                \r\n                // Configure layout\r\n                ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout(nestedCategory, detail);\r\n                \r\n                // Register for TOC navigation\r\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.tocId))\r\n                {\r\n                    TocLinkHandler.RegisterSection(detail.tocId, nestedCategory.GetComponent&lt;RectTransform&gt;(), nestedCategory);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add image if specified (before text content)\r\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.imageFile))\r\n                {\r\n                    CreateInlineImage(nestedCategory.Contents, detail.imageFile);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add description text\r\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.description))\r\n                {\r\n                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, detail.description);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add bullet items\r\n                if (detail.items != null &amp;&amp; detail.items.Count &gt; 0)\r\n                {\r\n                    var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();\r\n                    foreach (var item in detail.items)\r\n                    {\r\n                        sb.AppendLine($\"  • {item}\");\r\n                    }\r\n                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add numbered steps\r\n                if (detail.steps != null &amp;&amp; detail.steps.Count &gt; 0)\r\n                {\r\n                    var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();\r\n                    int stepNum = 1;\r\n                    foreach (var step in detail.steps)\r\n                    {\r\n                        sb.AppendLine($\"  &lt;color=#FFA500&gt;{stepNum}.&lt;/color&gt; {step}\");\r\n                        stepNum++;\r\n                    }\r\n                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Recursively render children\r\n                if (detail.children != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    foreach (var child in detail.children)\r\n                    {\r\n                        RenderOperationalDetailElement(nestedCategory, sourceText, child, categoryPrefab, page, depth + 1);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Default to collapsed\r\n                nestedCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);\r\n                if (nestedCategory.CollapseImage != null &amp;&amp; nestedCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    nestedCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = nestedCategory.NotVisibleImage;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Update animator state\r\n                var animator = nestedCategory.GetComponent&lt;IconAnimator&gt;();\r\n                if (animator != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    animator.Initialize(false);\r\n                }\r\n  {\r\n                ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating nested category: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Configure layout for nested collapsible categories\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout(StationpediaCategory category, OperationalDetail detail)\r\n        {\r\n            // Remove GridLayoutGroup if present\r\n            var existingGridLayout = category.Contents.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.GridLayoutGroup&gt;();\r\n            if (existingGridLayout != null)\r\n            {\r\n                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingGridLayout);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add background with custom color\r\n            var bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            if (bgImage == null)\r\n            {\r\n                bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Parse custom background color or use default Stationeers blue\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.backgroundColor))\r\n            {\r\n                if (ColorUtility.TryParseHtmlString(detail.backgroundColor, out Color customColor))\r\n                {\r\n                    bgImage.color = customColor;\r\n                }\r\n                else\r\n                {\r\n                    bgImage.color = StationeersBlue;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            else\r\n            {\r\n                bgImage.color = StationeersBlue;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add VerticalLayoutGroup\r\n            var layout = category.Contents.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup&gt;();\r\n            if (layout == null)\r\n            {\r\n                layout = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            layout.childForceExpandWidth = true;\r\n            layout.childForceExpandHeight = false;\r\n            layout.childControlWidth = true;\r\n            layout.childControlHeight = true;\r\n            layout.spacing = 5;\r\n            layout.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 10, 10);\r\n            \r\n            // Add ContentSizeFitter\r\n            var fitter = category.Contents.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n            if (fitter == null)\r\n            {\r\n                fitter = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            fitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;\r\n            fitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create inline content (non-collapsible text, items, steps)\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateInlineContent(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, OperationalDetail detail, int depth)\r\n        {\r\n            string indent = depth &gt; 0 ? $\"&lt;indent={depth * 5}%&gt;\" : \"\";\r\n            string indentEnd = depth &gt; 0 ? \"&lt;/indent&gt;\" : \"\";\r\n            string titleColor = depth == 0 ? \"#FF7A18\" : (depth == 1 ? \"#E06810\" : \"#C05808\");\r\n            \r\n            var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();\r\n            \r\n            // Add title\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title))\r\n            {\r\n                sb.Append(indent);\r\n                sb.AppendLine($\"&lt;color={titleColor}&gt;&lt;b&gt;{detail.title}&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/color&gt;\");\r\n                sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add description\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.description))\r\n            {\r\n                sb.Append(indent);\r\n                sb.AppendLine(detail.description);\r\n                sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add bullet items\r\n            if (detail.items != null &amp;&amp; detail.items.Count &gt; 0)\r\n            {\r\n                foreach (var item in detail.items)\r\n                {\r\n                    sb.Append(indent);\r\n                    sb.AppendLine($\"  • {item}\");\r\n                    sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add numbered steps\r\n            if (detail.steps != null &amp;&amp; detail.steps.Count &gt; 0)\r\n            {\r\n                int stepNum = 1;\r\n                foreach (var step in detail.steps)\r\n                {\r\n                    sb.Append(indent);\r\n                    sb.AppendLine($\"  &lt;color=#FFA500&gt;{stepNum}.&lt;/color&gt; {step}\");\r\n                    sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n                    stepNum++;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            if (sb.Length &gt; 0)\r\n            {\r\n                CreateTextElement(parent, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add image if specified\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.imageFile))\r\n            {\r\n                CreateInlineImage(parent, detail.imageFile);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create a text element inside a parent container\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateTextElement(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, string text)\r\n        {\r\n            var textGO = new GameObject(\"DetailText\");\r\n            textGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);\r\n            \r\n            var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent&lt;TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI&gt;();\r\n            textComponent.font = sourceText.font;\r\n            textComponent.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;\r\n            textComponent.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize;\r\n            textComponent.color = sourceText.color;\r\n            textComponent.enableWordWrapping = true;\r\n            textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;\r\n            textComponent.richText = true;\r\n            textComponent.lineSpacing = sourceText.lineSpacing;\r\n            textComponent.margin = new Vector4(5, 5, 5, 5);\r\n            textComponent.text = text;\r\n            \r\n            var rectTransform = textGO.GetComponent&lt;RectTransform&gt;();\r\n            rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);\r\n            rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);\r\n            rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);\r\n            \r\n            var fitter = textGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n            fitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;\r\n            fitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create an inline image element\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateInlineImage(RectTransform parent, string imageFile)\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                var sprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.LoadImageFromModFolder(imageFile);\r\n                if (sprite == null)\r\n                {\r\n                    ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Image not found: {imageFile}\");\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                var imageGO = new GameObject(\"InlineImage\");\r\n                imageGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);\r\n                \r\n                var image = imageGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n                image.sprite = sprite;\r\n                image.preserveAspect = true;\r\n                \r\n                var rectTransform = imageGO.GetComponent&lt;RectTransform&gt;();\r\n                rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);\r\n                rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);\r\n                rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);\r\n                \r\n                // Calculate size based on image aspect ratio\r\n                float maxWidth = 300f;\r\n                float aspectRatio = (float)sprite.texture.width / sprite.texture.height;\r\n                float height = maxWidth / aspectRatio;\r\n                \r\n                // Use LayoutElement to control size\r\n                var layoutElement = imageGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement&gt;();\r\n                layoutElement.preferredWidth = maxWidth;\r\n                layoutElement.preferredHeight = height;\r\n                layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0;\r\n                layoutElement.flexibleHeight = 0;\r\n                \r\n                rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(maxWidth, height);\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating inline image: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n",
  "textEditContent": "lear TOC registry for new page\r\n            TocLinkHandler.ClearRegistry();\r\n            \r\n            // Check for existing by GameObject name - destroy and recreate\r\n            var existingCategory = contentTransform.Find(\"OperationalDetailsCategory\");\r\n            if (existingCategory != null)\r\n            {\r\n                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingCategory.gameObject);\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;\r\n            if ((object)stationpedia == null || !stationpedia) return;\r\n            \r\n            var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;\r\n            if ((object)categoryPrefab == null || !categoryPrefab) return;\r\n            \r\n            // Get font/material from PageDescription (a working TMP element)\r\n            var sourceText = page.PageDescription;\r\n            if ((object)sourceText == null || !sourceText) return;\r\n\r\n            // Create the collapsible category container\r\n            StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate&lt;StationpediaCategory&gt;(\r\n                categoryPrefab, contentTransform);\r\n            if ((object)category == null || !category) return;\r\n            \r\n            // Name it so we can find it later\r\n            category.gameObject.name = \"OperationalDetailsCategory\";\r\n            \r\n            if ((object)category.Title == null || !category.Title) return;\r\n            if ((object)category.Contents == null || !category.Contents) return;\r\n            \r\n            // Set the title - apply custom color if configured\r\n            string titleColor = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceDesc.operationalDetailsTitleColor) \r\n                ? deviceDesc.operationalDetailsTitleColor \r\n                : \"#FF7A18\"; // Default orange\r\n            category.Title.text = $\"&lt;color={titleColor}&gt;Operational Details&lt;/color&gt;\";\r\n            \r\n            // Apply custom collapse/expand icons with animator\r\n            ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(category);\r\n            \r\n            // Try to add our custom phoenix icon next to the category title\r\n            AddCategoryIcon(category);\r\n            \r\n            // Configure category layout FIRST before adding content\r\n            ConfigureCategoryLayout(category, page, deviceDesc);\r\n\r\n            // Create Table of Contents if enabled\r\n            if (deviceDesc.generateToc)\r\n            {\r\n                CreateTableOfContents(category, sourceText, deviceDesc);\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // Render operational details - either as nested collapsibles or text\r\n            RenderAllOperationalDetails(category, sourceText, deviceDesc, categoryPrefab, page);\r\n            \r\n            // Move and set initial state\r\n            category.transform.SetSiblingIndex(20);\r\n            \r\n            // Default to COLLAPSED state\r\n            category.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);\r\n            if (category.CollapseImage != null &amp;&amp; category.NotVisibleImage != null)\r\n            {\r\n                category.CollapseImage.sprite = category.NotVisibleImage;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Update icon animator state\r\n            var animator = category.GetComponent&lt;IconAnimator&gt;();\r\n            if (animator != null)\r\n            {\r\n                animator.Initialize(false);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Force rebuild of the main content area to fix scrollbar visibility\r\n            if (Stationpedia.Instance?.ContentRectTransform != null)\r\n            {\r\n                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(Stationpedia.Instance.ContentRectTransform);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add to game's category list so it handles cleanup\r\n            page.CreatedCategories.Add(category);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Apply custom icons and animator to a category's collapse button\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(StationpediaCategory category)\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                if (category.CollapseImage == null) return;\r\n                \r\n                // Apply custom sprites if available\r\n                if (StationpediaAscendedMod._iconExpanded != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    category.VisibleImage = StationpediaAscendedMod._iconExpanded;\r\n                }\r\n                if (StationpediaAscendedMod._iconCollapsed != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    category.NotVisibleImage = StationpediaAscendedMod._iconCollapsed;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add IconAnimator component for smooth transitions\r\n                var animator = category.gameObject.GetComponent&lt;IconAnimator&gt;();\r\n                if (animator == null)\r\n                {\r\n                    animator = category.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;IconAnimator&gt;();\r\n                }\r\n                animator.TargetImage = category.CollapseImage;\r\n                animator.ExpandedSprite = category.VisibleImage;\r\n                animator.CollapsedSprite = category.NotVisibleImage;\r\n                \r\n                // Hook into the toggle to trigger animation\r\n                // We can't easily hook the button click, so we'll check state in Update via coroutine\r\n                if (StationpediaAscendedMod.Instance != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    StationpediaAscendedMod.Instance.StartCoroutine(MonitorCategoryState(category, animator));\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error applying custom icons: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Coroutine to monitor category state and trigger icon animation\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static IEnumerator MonitorCategoryState(StationpediaCategory category, IconAnimator animator)\r\n        {\r\n            if (category == null || animator == null) yield break;\r\n            \r\n            bool? lastState = null;\r\n            while (category != null &amp;&amp; category.Contents != null)\r\n            {\r\n                bool isExpanded = category.Contents.gameObject.activeSelf;\r\n                if (lastState != isExpanded)\r\n                {\r\n                    lastState = isExpanded;\r\n                    animator.SetState(isExpanded, lastState.HasValue); // Animate only after initial state\r\n                }\r\n                yield return new WaitForSeconds(0.05f);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create Table of Contents panel at the top of Operational Details\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateTableOfContents(StationpediaCategory parentCategory, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, DeviceDescriptions deviceDesc)\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                // Create TOC container\r\n                var tocGO = new GameObject(\"TableOfContents\");\r\n                tocGO.transform.SetParent(parentCategory.Contents, false);\r\n                tocGO.transform.SetAsFirstSibling(); // Put at top\r\n                \r\n                // Add background panel\r\n                var bgImage = tocGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n                bgImage.color = new Color(0.08f, 0.12f, 0.18f, 0.9f); // Slightly lighter than main background\r\n                \r\n                // Set up RectTransform\r\n                var tocRT = tocGO.GetComponent&lt;RectTransform&gt;();\r\n                tocRT.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);\r\n                tocRT.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);\r\n                tocRT.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);\r\n                \r\n                // Add padding layout\r\n                var tocLayout = tocGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup&gt;();\r\n                tocLayout.padding = new RectOffset(12, 12, 8, 8);\r\n                tocLayout.spacing = 4;\r\n                tocLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;\r\n                tocLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;\r\n                tocLayout.childControlWidth = true;\r\n                tocLayout.childControlHeight = true;\r\n                \r\n                // Auto-size height\r\n                var tocFitter = tocGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n                tocFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;\r\n                tocFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;\r\n                \r\n                // Create title\r\n                var titleGO = new GameObject(\"TOCTitle\");\r\n                titleGO.transform.SetParent(tocGO.transform, false);\r\n                var titleText = titleGO.AddComponent&lt;TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI&gt;();\r\n                titleText.font = sourceText.font;\r\n                titleText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;\r\n                titleText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize * 0.9f;\r\n                titleText.color = new Color(1f, 0.6f, 0.2f, 1f); // Orange\r\n                titleText.text = string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceDesc.tocTitle) ? \"&lt;b&gt;Contents&lt;/b&gt;\" : $\"&lt;b&gt;{deviceDesc.tocTitle}&lt;/b&gt;\";\r\n                titleText.enableWordWrapping = false;\r\n                \r\n                var titleFitter = titleGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n                titleFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;\r\n                \r\n                // Create links container\r\n                var linksGO = new GameObject(\"TOCLinks\");\r\n                linksGO.transform.SetParent(tocGO.transform, false);\r\n                var linksText = linksGO.AddComponent&lt;TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI&gt;();\r\n                linksText.font = sourceText.font;\r\n                linksText.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;\r\n                linksText.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize * 0.85f;\r\n                linksText.color = sourceText.color;\r\n                linksText.enableWordWrapping = true;\r\n                linksText.richText = true;\r\n                \r\n                // Build TOC links from operational details with tocId\r\n                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();\r\n                int index = 0;\r\n                foreach (var detail in deviceDesc.operationalDetails)\r\n                {\r\n                    BuildTocLinks(sb, detail, ref index);\r\n                }\r\n                linksText.text = sb.ToString().TrimEnd();\r\n                \r\n                var linksFitter = linksGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n                linksFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;\r\n                \r\n                // Add click handler for TOC links\r\n                var linkHandler = linksGO.AddComponent&lt;TocLinkHandler&gt;();\r\n                linkHandler.TextComponent = linksText;\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating TOC: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Recursively build TOC links from operational details\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void BuildTocLinks(System.Text.StringBuilder sb, OperationalDetail detail, ref int index, int depth = 0)\r\n        {\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.tocId) &amp;&amp; !string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title))\r\n            {\r\n                string indent = depth &gt; 0 ? new string(' ', depth * 3) : \"\";\r\n                string bullet = depth == 0 ? \"▸\" : \"›\";\r\n                sb.AppendLine($\"{indent}{bullet} &lt;link=toc_{detail.tocId}&gt;&lt;color=#008AE6&gt;{detail.title}&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt;\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            if (detail.children != null)\r\n            {\r\n                foreach (var child in detail.children)\r\n                {\r\n                    BuildTocLinks(sb, child, ref index, depth + 1);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            index++;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Render all operational details - creates nested collapsible categories or inline text\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void RenderAllOperationalDetails(StationpediaCategory parentCategory, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, \r\n            DeviceDescriptions deviceDesc, StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, UniversalPage page)\r\n        {\r\n            foreach (var detail in deviceDesc.operationalDetails)\r\n            {\r\n                RenderOperationalDetailElement(parentCategory, sourceText, detail, categoryPrefab, page, 0);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Render a single operational detail element - either as collapsible category or inline content\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void RenderOperationalDetailElement(StationpediaCategory parentCategory, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText,\r\n            OperationalDetail detail, StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, UniversalPage page, int depth)\r\n        {\r\n            if (detail.collapsible &amp;&amp; !string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title))\r\n            {\r\n                // Create a nested collapsible category\r\n                CreateNestedCollapsibleCategory(parentCategory, sourceText, detail, categoryPrefab, page, depth);\r\n            }\r\n            else\r\n            {\r\n                // Create inline content (text, items, steps, image)\r\n                CreateInlineContent(parentCategory.Contents, sourceText, detail, depth);\r\n                \r\n                // Recursively render non-collapsible children\r\n                if (detail.children != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    foreach (var child in detail.children)\r\n                    {\r\n                        RenderOperationalDetailElement(parentCategory, sourceText, child, categoryPrefab, page, depth + 1);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create a nested collapsible category within parent's Contents\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateNestedCollapsibleCategory(StationpediaCategory parentCategory, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText,\r\n            OperationalDetail detail, StationpediaCategory categoryPrefab, UniversalPage page, int depth)\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                // Create nested category\r\n                var nestedCategory = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate&lt;StationpediaCategory&gt;(categoryPrefab, parentCategory.Contents);\r\n                if (nestedCategory == null) return;\r\n                \r\n                string safeTocId = detail.tocId ?? detail.title?.Replace(\" \", \"_\") ?? $\"section_{depth}\";\r\n                nestedCategory.gameObject.name = $\"NestedCategory_{safeTocId}\";\r\n                \r\n                // Set title with depth-based coloring\r\n                string titleColor = depth == 0 ? \"#FF7A18\" : (depth == 1 ? \"#E09030\" : \"#C08040\");\r\n                nestedCategory.Title.text = $\"&lt;color={titleColor}&gt;{detail.title}&lt;/color&gt;\";\r\n                \r\n                // Apply custom icons\r\n                ApplyCustomCategoryIcons(nestedCategory);\r\n                \r\n                // Configure layout\r\n                ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout(nestedCategory, detail);\r\n                \r\n                // Register for TOC navigation\r\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.tocId))\r\n                {\r\n                    TocLinkHandler.RegisterSection(detail.tocId, nestedCategory.GetComponent&lt;RectTransform&gt;(), nestedCategory);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add image if specified (before text content)\r\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.imageFile))\r\n                {\r\n                    CreateInlineImage(nestedCategory.Contents, detail.imageFile);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add description text\r\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.description))\r\n                {\r\n                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, detail.description);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add bullet items\r\n                if (detail.items != null &amp;&amp; detail.items.Count &gt; 0)\r\n                {\r\n                    var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();\r\n                    foreach (var item in detail.items)\r\n                    {\r\n                        sb.AppendLine($\"  • {item}\");\r\n                    }\r\n                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add numbered steps\r\n                if (detail.steps != null &amp;&amp; detail.steps.Count &gt; 0)\r\n                {\r\n                    var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();\r\n                    int stepNum = 1;\r\n                    foreach (var step in detail.steps)\r\n                    {\r\n                        sb.AppendLine($\"  &lt;color=#FFA500&gt;{stepNum}.&lt;/color&gt; {step}\");\r\n                        stepNum++;\r\n                    }\r\n                    CreateTextElement(nestedCategory.Contents, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Recursively render children\r\n                if (detail.children != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    foreach (var child in detail.children)\r\n                    {\r\n                        RenderOperationalDetailElement(nestedCategory, sourceText, child, categoryPrefab, page, depth + 1);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Default to collapsed\r\n                nestedCategory.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(false);\r\n                if (nestedCategory.CollapseImage != null &amp;&amp; nestedCategory.NotVisibleImage != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    nestedCategory.CollapseImage.sprite = nestedCategory.NotVisibleImage;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Update animator state\r\n                var animator = nestedCategory.GetComponent&lt;IconAnimator&gt;();\r\n                if (animator != null)\r\n                {\r\n                    animator.Initialize(false);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Add to page's created categories for cleanup\r\n                page.CreatedCategories.Add(nestedCategory);\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating nested category: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Configure layout for nested collapsible categories\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout(StationpediaCategory category, OperationalDetail detail)\r\n        {\r\n            // Remove GridLayoutGroup if present\r\n            var existingGridLayout = category.Contents.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.GridLayoutGroup&gt;();\r\n            if (existingGridLayout != null)\r\n            {\r\n                UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(existingGridLayout);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add background with custom color\r\n            var bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            if (bgImage == null)\r\n            {\r\n                bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Parse custom background color or use default Stationeers blue\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.backgroundColor))\r\n            {\r\n                if (ColorUtility.TryParseHtmlString(detail.backgroundColor, out Color customColor))\r\n                {\r\n                    bgImage.color = customColor;\r\n                }\r\n                else\r\n                {\r\n                    bgImage.color = StationeersBlue;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            else\r\n            {\r\n                bgImage.color = StationeersBlue;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add VerticalLayoutGroup\r\n            var layout = category.Contents.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup&gt;();\r\n            if (layout == null)\r\n            {\r\n                layout = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            layout.childForceExpandWidth = true;\r\n            layout.childForceExpandHeight = false;\r\n            layout.childControlWidth = true;\r\n            layout.childControlHeight = true;\r\n            layout.spacing = 5;\r\n            layout.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 10, 10);\r\n            \r\n            // Add ContentSizeFitter\r\n            var fitter = category.Contents.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n            if (fitter == null)\r\n            {\r\n                fitter = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            fitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;\r\n            fitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create inline content (non-collapsible text, items, steps)\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateInlineContent(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, OperationalDetail detail, int depth)\r\n        {\r\n            string indent = depth &gt; 0 ? $\"&lt;indent={depth * 5}%&gt;\" : \"\";\r\n            string indentEnd = depth &gt; 0 ? \"&lt;/indent&gt;\" : \"\";\r\n            string titleColor = depth == 0 ? \"#FF7A18\" : (depth == 1 ? \"#E06810\" : \"#C05808\");\r\n            \r\n            var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();\r\n            \r\n            // Add title\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.title))\r\n            {\r\n                sb.Append(indent);\r\n                sb.AppendLine($\"&lt;color={titleColor}&gt;&lt;b&gt;{detail.title}&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/color&gt;\");\r\n                sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add description\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.description))\r\n            {\r\n                sb.Append(indent);\r\n                sb.AppendLine(detail.description);\r\n                sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add bullet items\r\n            if (detail.items != null &amp;&amp; detail.items.Count &gt; 0)\r\n            {\r\n                foreach (var item in detail.items)\r\n                {\r\n                    sb.Append(indent);\r\n                    sb.AppendLine($\"  • {item}\");\r\n                    sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add numbered steps\r\n            if (detail.steps != null &amp;&amp; detail.steps.Count &gt; 0)\r\n            {\r\n                int stepNum = 1;\r\n                foreach (var step in detail.steps)\r\n                {\r\n                    sb.Append(indent);\r\n                    sb.AppendLine($\"  &lt;color=#FFA500&gt;{stepNum}.&lt;/color&gt; {step}\");\r\n                    sb.Append(indentEnd);\r\n                    stepNum++;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            if (sb.Length &gt; 0)\r\n            {\r\n                CreateTextElement(parent, sourceText, sb.ToString().TrimEnd());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Add image if specified\r\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail.imageFile))\r\n            {\r\n                CreateInlineImage(parent, detail.imageFile);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create a text element inside a parent container\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateTextElement(RectTransform parent, TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI sourceText, string text)\r\n        {\r\n            var textGO = new GameObject(\"DetailText\");\r\n            textGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);\r\n            \r\n            var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent&lt;TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI&gt;();\r\n            textComponent.font = sourceText.font;\r\n            textComponent.fontSharedMaterial = sourceText.fontSharedMaterial;\r\n            textComponent.fontSize = sourceText.fontSize;\r\n            textComponent.color = sourceText.color;\r\n            textComponent.enableWordWrapping = true;\r\n            textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;\r\n            textComponent.richText = true;\r\n            textComponent.lineSpacing = sourceText.lineSpacing;\r\n            textComponent.margin = new Vector4(5, 5, 5, 5);\r\n            textComponent.text = text;\r\n            \r\n            var rectTransform = textGO.GetComponent&lt;RectTransform&gt;();\r\n            rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);\r\n            rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);\r\n            rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);\r\n            \r\n            var fitter = textGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter&gt;();\r\n            fitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;\r\n            fitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        /// &lt;summary&gt;\r\n        /// Create an inline image element\r\n        /// &lt;/summary&gt;\r\n        private static void CreateInlineImage(RectTransform parent, string imageFile)\r\n        {\r\n            try\r\n            {\r\n                var sprite = StationpediaAscendedMod.LoadImageFromModFolder(imageFile);\r\n                if (sprite == null)\r\n                {\r\n                    ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Image not found: {imageFile}\");\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                var imageGO = new GameObject(\"InlineImage\");\r\n                imageGO.transform.SetParent(parent, false);\r\n                \r\n                var image = imageGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n                image.sprite = sprite;\r\n                image.preserveAspect = true;\r\n                \r\n                var rectTransform = imageGO.GetComponent&lt;RectTransform&gt;();\r\n                rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);\r\n                rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);\r\n                rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);\r\n                \r\n                // Calculate size based on image aspect ratio\r\n                float maxWidth = 300f;\r\n                float aspectRatio = (float)sprite.texture.width / sprite.texture.height;\r\n                float height = maxWidth / aspectRatio;\r\n                \r\n                // Use LayoutElement to control size\r\n                var layoutElement = imageGO.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement&gt;();\r\n                layoutElement.preferredWidth = maxWidth;\r\n                layoutElement.preferredHeight = height;\r\n                layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0;\r\n                layoutElement.flexibleHeight = 0;\r\n                \r\n                rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(maxWidth, height);\r\n            }\r\n            catch (Exception ex)\r\n            {\r\n                ConsoleWindow.Print($\"[Stationpedia Ascended] Error creating inline image: {ex.Message}\");\r\n            }",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

device only receives signals on its channel, does not broadcast.\"\r\n        },\r\n        \"Active\": {\r\n          \"modeValue\": \"Active\",\r\n          \"description\": \"Active mode - device broadcasts its Setting value on the configured channel.\"\r\n        }\r\n      },\r\n      \"OperationalDetails\": [\r\n        {\r\n          \"title\": \"Passive Mode Operation\",\r\n          \"description\": \"In Passive mode, use screwdriver to select which device to mirror. Reading does NOT require line-of-sight.\"        \r\n        },\r\n        {\r\n          \"title\": \"Active Mode Operation\",\r\n          \"description\": \"In Active mode, the transmitter broadcasts its own Setting value. In Passive mode, power is required to read values from the linked device. processes organic matter into fertilizer.\"\r\n        },\r\n        \"Mode1\": {\r\n          \"modeValue\": \"Mode1\",\r\n          \"description\": \"Alternative composting mode - may affect output ratio or speed.\"\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    {\r\n      \"deviceKey\": \"ThingStructureChuteFlipFlopSplitter\",\r\n      \"displayName\": \"Chute Flip Flop Splitter\",\r\n      \"logicDescriptions\": {\r\n        \"Mode\": {\r\n          \"dataType\": \"Integer\",\r\n          \"range\": \"0-1\",\r\n          \"description\": \"Splitter direction mode.\"\r\n        },\r\n        \"ReferenceId\": {\r\n          \"dataType\": \"Hash\",\r\n          \"range\": \"Unique\",\r\n          \"description\": \"Unique reference ID.\"\r\n        }\r\n      },\r\n      \"modeDescriptions\": {\r\n        \"Mode0\": {\r\n          \"modeValue\": \"Mode0\",\r\n          \"description\": \"Output left -   },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "\"\"\"\nUpdate descriptions.json to add a comprehensive test entry for the new Guide Format features\n\"\"\"\nimport json\n\n# Read the existing file\nwith open(r\"c:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\StationpediaAscended\\mod\\descriptions.json\", \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n    data = json.load(f)\n\n# Find and update the SolidFuelGenerator entry with new features\nfor i, device in enumerate(data.get(\"devices\", [])):\n    if device.get(\"deviceKey\") == \"ThingStructureSolidFuelGenerator\":\n        # Replace with comprehensive test entry\n        data[\"devices\"][i] = {\n            \"deviceKey\": \"ThingStructureSolidFuelGenerator\",\n            \"displayName\": \"📖 GUIDE FORMAT TEST - Solid Fuel Generator\",\n            \"pageDescriptionPrepend\": \"&lt;color=#00FF00&gt;&lt;b&gt;🧪 GUIDE FORMAT ADDITIONS TEST PAGE&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/color&gt;\\nThis page demonstrates ALL new features including nested collapsibles, TOC, and images.\\n\\n\",\n            \"generateToc\": True,\n            \"tocTitle\": \"📚 Quick Navigation\",\n            \"operationalDetailsTitleColor\": \"#FF7A18\",\n            \"operationalDetailsBackgroundColor\": \"#0A1520\",\n            \"OperationalDetails\": [\n                {\n                    \"title\": \"Basic Overview\",\n                    \"tocId\": \"overview\",\n                    \"collapsible\": True,\n                    \"description\": \"This is a COLLAPSIBLE section! Click the icon to expand/collapse.\\n\\nThe Solid Fuel Generator burns coal, biomass, or other solid fuels to produce electricity.\",\n                    \"items\": [\n                        \"Input: Coal, Charcoal, or Biomass\",\n                        \"Output: Up to 5kW of power\",\n                        \"Requires: Oxygen atmosphere\"\n                    ]\n                },\n                {\n                    \"title\": \"Fuel Types\",\n                    \"tocId\": \"fuels\",\n                    \"collapsible\": True,\n                    \"description\": \"Different fuels have different burn rates and efficiency:\",\n                    \"children\": [\n                        {\n                            \"title\": \"Coal\",\n                            \"tocId\": \"coal\",\n                            \"collapsible\": True,\n                            \"description\": \"Primary fuel source, obtained from mining coal ore.\",\n                            \"items\": [\n                                \"Burn time: ~180 seconds\",\n                                \"Power output: 5kW\",\n                                \"Pollution: High\"\n                            ]\n                        },\n                        {\n                            \"title\": \"Charcoal\",\n                            \"tocId\": \"charcoal\",\n                            \"collapsible\": True,\n                            \"description\": \"Made by processing wood in a furnace.\",\n                            \"items\": [\n                                \"Burn time: ~120 seconds\",\n                                \"Power output: 4kW\",\n                                \"Pollution: Medium\"\n                            ]\n                        },\n                        {\n                            \"title\": \"Biomass\",\n                            \"tocId\": \"biomass\",\n                            \"collapsible\": True,\n                            \"description\": \"Renewable fuel from plants.\",\n                            \"items\": [\n                                \"Burn time: ~60 seconds\",\n                                \"Power output: 2kW\",\n                                \"Pollution: Low\"\n                            ]\n                        }\n                    ]\n                },\n                {\n                    \"title\": \"Setup Guide\",\n                    \"tocId\": \"setup\",\n                    \"collapsible\": True,\n                    \"description\": \"Follow these steps to set up your generator:\",\n                    \"steps\": [\n                        \"Place the Solid Fuel Generator on a solid surface\",\n                        \"Connect power cables to the generator\",\n                        \"Ensure the room has oxygen (required for combustion)\",\n                        \"Insert fuel into the generator slot\",\n                        \"Set the generator to ON using logic or manual switch\"\n                    ]\n                },\n                {\n                    \"title\": \"Inline Text Section (Non-Collapsible)\",\n                    \"description\": \"This section is NOT collapsible because 'collapsible' is not set to true. It appears as inline text with TMP formatting support.\\n\\n&lt;color=#FFAA00&gt;Note:&lt;/color&gt; Use collapsible sections for longer content that users may want to hide.\"\n                },\n                {\n                    \"title\": \"Troubleshooting\",\n                    \"tocId\": \"troubleshooting\",\n                    \"collapsible\": True,\n                    \"description\": \"Common issues and solutions:\",\n                    \"children\": [\n                        {\n                            \"title\": \"Generator Won't Start\",\n                            \"collapsible\": True,\n                            \"items\": [\n                                \"Check if fuel is loaded\",\n                                \"Verify oxygen level in room (needs O2 for combustion)\",\n                                \"Ensure 'On' state is set to 1\"\n                            ]\n                        },\n                        {\n                            \"title\": \"Low Power Output\",\n                            \"collapsible\": True,\n                            \"items\": [\n                                \"Check fuel type (coal &gt; charcoal &gt; biomass)\",\n                                \"Verify cable connections\",\n                                \"Check for power network overload\"\n                            ]\n                        }\n                    ]\n                }\n            ]\n        }\n        print(f\"Updated entry at index {i}\")\n        break\n\n# Write back\nwith open(r\"c:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\StationpediaAscended\\mod\\descriptions.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n    json.dump(data, f, indent=2)\n\nprint(\"Done! descriptions.json updated with new test entry.\")\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/StationpediaAscended/plans/guide-format-additions-phase-complete.md)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/StationpediaAscended/plans/guide-format-additions-phase-complete.md)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "## Phase 1-6 Complete: Guide Format Additions - Full Implementation\n\nAll phases have been implemented in a single development session. The mod now supports nested collapsible dropdowns, custom icons with animation, Table of Contents with scroll-to navigation, and inline image insertion.\n\n**Files created:**\n- [src/UI/IconAnimator.cs](../mod/src/UI/IconAnimator.cs) - Animated icon transitions with scale \"pop\" effect\n- [src/UI/TocLinkHandler.cs](../mod/src/UI/TocLinkHandler.cs) - TOC click handling and scroll-to-section navigation\n- [plans/guide-format-additions-plan.md](guide-format-additions-plan.md) - Development plan\n- mod/images/ - Directory for custom icons and inline images\n- mod/update_test_entry.py - Helper script for updating test JSON\n\n**Files changed:**\n- [src/Data/Models.cs](../mod/src/Data/Models.cs) - Added new properties to OperationalDetail and DeviceDescriptions\n- [src/Harmony/Patches.cs](../mod/src/Harmony/Patches.cs) - Complete refactor for nested categories, TOC, and images\n- [StationpediaAscended.cs](../mod/StationpediaAscended.cs) - Added icon loading and image utility methods\n- descriptions.json - Updated test entry with all new features\n\n**Functions created/changed:**\n\nNew in Models.cs:\n- &#96;OperationalDetail.collapsible&#96; - Boolean to make section a collapsible category\n- &#96;OperationalDetail.tocId&#96; - ID for TOC linking and scroll-to navigation\n- &#96;OperationalDetail.imageFile&#96; - Relative path to inline image\n- &#96;OperationalDetail.backgroundColor&#96; - Custom hex color for section background\n- &#96;DeviceDescriptions.generateToc&#96; - Enable TOC generation\n- &#96;DeviceDescriptions.tocTitle&#96; - Custom TOC title\n- &#96;DeviceDescriptions.operationalDetailsBackgroundColor&#96; - Global background color\n\nNew in Patches.cs:\n- &#96;ApplyCustomCategoryIcons()&#96; - Applies custom expand/collapse icons\n- &#96;MonitorCategoryState()&#96; - Coroutine to trigger icon animation on state change\n- &#96;CreateTableOfContents()&#96; - Generates TOC panel with clickable links\n- &#96;BuildTocLinks()&#96; - Recursively builds TOC link text\n- &#96;RenderAllOperationalDetails()&#96; - Entry point for rendering\n- &#96;RenderOperationalDetailElement()&#96; - Handles collapsible vs inline rendering\n- &#96;CreateNestedCollapsibleCategory()&#96; - Creates nested StationpediaCategory\n- &#96;ConfigureNestedCategoryLayout()&#96; - Sets up layout for nested categories\n- &#96;CreateInlineContent()&#96; - Creates non-collapsible text content\n- &#96;CreateTextElement()&#96; - Helper to create TMP text\n- &#96;CreateInlineImage()&#96; - Loads and displays PNG images\n\nNew in StationpediaAscended.cs:\n- &#96;LoadCustomIcons()&#96; - Loads icon_expanded.png and icon_collapsed.png\n- &#96;LoadSpriteFromFile()&#96; - Helper to load PNG as Unity Sprite\n- &#96;LoadImageFromModFolder()&#96; - Public API for loading images from mod folder\n\nNew Components:\n- &#96;IconAnimator&#96; - MonoBehaviour for animated icon transitions\n- &#96;TocLinkHandler&#96; - MonoBehaviour for TOC click handling\n\n**Tests created/changed:**\n- Comprehensive test entry for ThingStructureSolidFuelGenerator in descriptions.json\n\n**Review Status:** Self-reviewed during implementation\n\n**Git Commit Message:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nfeat: Add advanced guide formatting features\n\n- Implement nested collapsible dropdowns using StationpediaCategory\n- Add IconAnimator component with scale animation on expand/collapse\n- Create Table of Contents with clickable scroll-to navigation\n- Support inline PNG images in operational details\n- Add configurable background colors (Stationeers blue default)\n- Update data models with collapsible, tocId, imageFile properties\n- Create comprehensive test entry demonstrating all features\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**New JSON Schema Properties:**\n\nFor &#96;OperationalDetail&#96;:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"collapsible\": true,      // Make this a collapsible dropdown\n  \"tocId\": \"section-id\",    // ID for TOC linking\n  \"imageFile\": \"path.png\",  // Inline image from images folder\n  \"backgroundColor\": \"#hex\" // Custom background color\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nFor &#96;DeviceDescriptions&#96;:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"generateToc\": true,              // Enable TOC generation\n  \"tocTitle\": \"Custom Title\",       // TOC panel title\n  \"operationalDetailsBackgroundColor\": \"#hex\"  // Global background\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Usage Example:**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"deviceKey\": \"ThingStructureSolidFuelGenerator\",\n  \"generateToc\": true,\n  \"tocTitle\": \"Quick Navigation\",\n  \"OperationalDetails\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Fuel Types\",\n      \"tocId\": \"fuels\",\n      \"collapsible\": true,\n      \"children\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"Coal\",\n          \"tocId\": \"coal\",\n          \"collapsible\": true,\n          \"description\": \"Primary fuel source\"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```

First, let me add a public static method: Now let me update the `Patches.cs` to implement the full nested collapsible structure with TOC and images. Let me create an updated version: Now let me replace the CreateOperationalDetailsCategory method and related methods with the new implementation supporting nested collapsibles, TOC, and images: Now let me update the remaining methods (AddCategoryIcon and the old RenderOperationalDetail that we need to remove, plus keep ConfigureCategoryLayout): Now I need to update the ConfigureCategoryLayout method to accept the optional deviceDesc parameter: Now let me create the images folder and create a test JSON entry. ## Implementation Complete! 🎉

I've successfully implemented all the Guide Format Additions features on the new `Guide-Format-Additions` branch. Here's a summary:

### What Was Done:

1. **✅ Git Operations**
   - Committed existing work to master and pushed to GitHub
   - Created new branch `Guide-Format-Additions`

2. **✅ Nested Collapsible Dropdowns**
   - Created `CreateNestedCollapsibleCategory()` that instantiates `StationpediaCategory` inside parent's `Contents`
   - Supports unlimited nesting depth
   - Each level has progressively dimmer title colors for visual hierarchy
   - Background uses Stationeers blue (#0A1520) by default, customizable via `backgroundColor` property

3. **✅ Custom Icons with Animation**
   - Created `IconAnimator.cs` component
   - Scale "pop" animation on expand/collapse (0.15s duration)
   - Supports custom `icon_expanded.png` and `icon_collapsed.png` from `images/` folder
   - Falls back to phoenix icon if custom icons not found

4. **✅ Table of Contents**
   - Created `TocLinkHandler.cs` for click handling
   - TOC appears as styled panel at top of Operational Details
   - Uses `<link=toc_sectionId>` tags for navigation
   - Enable with `"generateToc": true` in JSON
   - Custom title via `"tocTitle": "Contents"`

5. **✅ Scroll-To Navigation**
   - Clicking TOC link scrolls to target section
   - Automatically expands collapsed sections when navigating
   - Smooth animated scroll (0.3s ease-out cubic)
   - Section registry for tracking positions

6. **✅ Inline Image Support**
   - `LoadImageFromModFolder()` utility for runtime PNG loading
   - `CreateInlineImage()` adds images to content
   - Preserves aspect ratio with 300px max width
   - Use `"imageFile": "myimage.png"` in JSON

### New JSON Properties:

```json
{
  "deviceKey": "ThingExample",
  "generateToc": true,
  "tocTitle": "📚 Quick Navigation",
  "operationalDetailsBackgroundColor": "#0A1520",
  "OperationalDetails": [
    {
      "title": "Section Title",
      "tocId": "section-id",
      "collapsible": true,
      "backgroundColor": "#custom",
      "imageFile": "screenshot.png",
      "description": "Content here...",
      "children": [...]
    }
  ]
}
```

### Files to Add Custom Icons:
- `mod/images/icon_expanded.png` - Shown when section is expanded
- `mod/images/icon_collapsed.png` - Shown when section is collapsed

### Build Status: ✅ SUCCESS

The mod compiles without errors and has been deployed to the game folder. Test by:
1. Launch Stationeers
2. Open Stationpedia
3. Search for "Solid Fuel Generator"
4. Look for the test page with green header

### Git Commit Message:
```
feat: Add advanced guide formatting features

- Implement nested collapsible dropdowns using StationpediaCategory
- Add IconAnimator component with scale animation on expand/collapse
- Create Table of Contents with clickable scroll-to navigation
- Support inline PNG images in operational details
- Add configurable background colors (Stationeers blue default)
- Update data models with collapsible, tocId, imageFile properties
- Create comprehensive test entry demonstrating all features
```

**Ready for your testing and commit!** Would you like me to make any adjustments before you test in-game?

  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;csharp\n - use existing game sprite for rounded corners\r\n            var bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            if (bgImage == null)\r\n            {\r\n                bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Try to get a rounded sprite from an existing Stationeers UI element\r\n            var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;\r\n            if (stationpedia != null)\r\n            {\r\n                // Find a suitable background sprite from existing UI (these typically have rounded corners)\r\n                var existingBgs = stationpedia.GetComponentsInChildren&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;(true);\r\n                foreach (var existingBg in existingBgs)\r\n                {\r\n                    // Look for sliced images which typically have rounded corners\r\n                    if (existingBg.type == UnityEngine.UI.Image.Type.Sliced &amp;&amp; existingBg.sprite != null)\r\n                    {\r\n                        bgImage.sprite = existingBg.sprite;\r\n                        bgImage.type = UnityEngine.UI.Image.Type.Sliced;\r\n                        break;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n",
  "textEditContent": " - use existing game sprite for rounded corners\r\n            var bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.GetComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            if (bgImage == null)\r\n            {\r\n                bgImage = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;();\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Try to get a rounded sprite from an existing Stationeers UI element\r\n            var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;\r\n            if (stationpedia != null)\r\n            {\r\n                // Find a suitable background sprite from existing UI (these typically have rounded corners)\r\n                var existingBgs = stationpedia.GetComponentsInChildren&lt;UnityEngine.UI.Image&gt;(true);\r\n                foreach (var existingBg in existingBgs)\r\n                {\r\n                    // Look for sliced images which typically have rounded corners\r\n                    if (existingBg.type == UnityEngine.UI.Image.Type.Sliced &amp;&amp; existingBg.sprite != null)\r\n                    {\r\n                        bgImage.sprite = existingBg.sprite;\r\n                        bgImage.type = UnityEngine.UI.Image.Type.Sliced;\r\n                        break;\r\n                    }\r\n                }",

{
  "invocationMessage": "Using \"Replace String in File\"",
