{
  "invocationMessage": "Using \"Replace String in File\"",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n3.0] - 2025-12-31\r\n\r\n### 🤖 Comprehensive AIMeE Documentation\r\n- **Full AIMeE Guide** - Added extensive documentation for the AIMeE (ThingRobot) companion robot\r\n- **Mode Explanations** - Detailed descriptions for all AIMeE modes: None, Follow, MoveToTarget, Roam, Unload, PathToTarget, StorageFull\r\n- **IC10 Programming Guide** - Complete guide for programming AIMeE with example code snippets\r\n- **Navigation &amp; Mining** - Documented pathfinding behavior, mining mechanics, and coordinate systems\r\n- **Table of Contents** - Added navigable TOC with clickable links to each section\r\n\r\n### 📑 Multi-Column Table of Contents\r\n- **Column Layout** - TOC now displays in columns (max 8 rows per column) instead of a long vertical list\r\n- **Dynamic Columns** - Automatically creates additional columns when entries exceed 8\r\n- **Improved Readability** - Better use of horizontal space for guides with many sections\r\n\r\n### 🎨 Vanilla Mode Default &amp; Easter Egg Toggle\r\n- **Vanilla by Default** - Mod now starts in vanilla Stationpedia styling mode\r\n- **Header Toggle** - Click the \"Stationpedia\" header to toggle Ascended mode (easter egg)\r\n- **Visual Feedback** - Header changes to \"Stationpedia Ascended\" with orange styling when enabled\r\n- **Icon Swap** - Custom phoenix icon only appears in Ascended mode\r\n- **Removed Book Button** - Simplified UI by removing the mode toggle button\r\n\r\n### 🔧 Bug Fixes\r\n- **Fixed JSON Syntax Error** - Resolved corrupted line in descriptions.json that broke tooltip parsing\r\n- **Fixed Brace Mismatch** - Corrected code structure issues in icon replacement logic\r\n\r\n### 📝 New Files\r\n- &#96;VanillaModeManager.cs&#96; - Static manager for vanilla/ascended mode state\r\n- &#96;CategoryHeaderHandler.cs&#96; - Handler for category header interactions\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## [0.\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n",
  "textEditContent": "3.0] - 2025-12-31\r\n\r\n### 🤖 Comprehensive AIMeE Documentation\r\n- **Full AIMeE Guide** - Added extensive documentation for the AIMeE (ThingRobot) companion robot\r\n- **Mode Explanations** - Detailed descriptions for all AIMeE modes: None, Follow, MoveToTarget, Roam, Unload, PathToTarget, StorageFull\r\n- **IC10 Programming Guide** - Complete guide for programming AIMeE with example code snippets\r\n- **Navigation &amp; Mining** - Documented pathfinding behavior, mining mechanics, and coordinate systems\r\n- **Table of Contents** - Added navigable TOC with clickable links to each section\r\n\r\n### 📑 Multi-Column Table of Contents\r\n- **Column Layout** - TOC now displays in columns (max 8 rows per column) instead of a long vertical list\r\n- **Dynamic Columns** - Automatically creates additional columns when entries exceed 8\r\n- **Improved Readability** - Better use of horizontal space for guides with many sections\r\n\r\n### 🎨 Vanilla Mode Default &amp; Easter Egg Toggle\r\n- **Vanilla by Default** - Mod now starts in vanilla Stationpedia styling mode\r\n- **Header Toggle** - Click the \"Stationpedia\" header to toggle Ascended mode (easter egg)\r\n- **Visual Feedback** - Header changes to \"Stationpedia Ascended\" with orange styling when enabled\r\n- **Icon Swap** - Custom phoenix icon only appears in Ascended mode\r\n- **Removed Book Button** - Simplified UI by removing the mode toggle button\r\n\r\n### 🔧 Bug Fixes\r\n- **Fixed JSON Syntax Error** - Resolved corrupted line in descriptions.json that broke tooltip parsing\r\n- **Fixed Brace Mismatch** - Corrected code structure issues in icon replacement logic\r\n\r\n### 📝 New Files\r\n- &#96;VanillaModeManager.cs&#96; - Static manager for vanilla/ascended mode state\r\n- &#96;CategoryHeaderHandler.cs&#96; - Handler for category header interactions\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## [0.",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/StationpediaAscended/mod/LLM_INSTRUCTIONS.txt)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/StationpediaAscended/mod/LLM_INSTRUCTIONS.txt)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "================================================================================\nSTATIONPEDIA ASCENDED v0.3.0 - LLM INSTRUCTIONS FOR WRITING descriptions.json\n================================================================================\n\nYou are helping write device documentation for the Stationeers game mod \n\"Stationpedia Ascended\". This mod enhances the in-game encyclopedia with \ncustom tooltips, collapsible sections, table of contents, images, and videos.\n\n================================================================================\nFILE STRUCTURE\n================================================================================\n\nThe descriptions.json file has this top-level structure:\n\n{\n  \"version\": \"1.0\",\n  \"devices\": [ ... array of device entries ... ],\n  \"genericDescriptions\": { ... global fallback descriptions ... }\n}\n\n================================================================================\nDEVICE ENTRY FORMAT (Complete Reference)\n================================================================================\n\n{\n  \"deviceKey\": \"ThingStructureDeviceName\",      // REQUIRED - exact prefab name\n  \"displayName\": \"Human Readable Name\",          // Optional - for documentation\n\n  // === PAGE DESCRIPTION OPTIONS (pick ONE or combine append/prepend) ===\n  \"pageDescription\": \"Replaces entire description\",\n  \"pageDescriptionAppend\": \"Added to end of existing description\",\n  \"pageDescriptionPrepend\": \"Added to beginning of existing description\",\n\n  // === TABLE OF CONTENTS (TOC) ===\n  \"generateToc\": true,                           // Enable TOC panel at top\n  \"tocTitle\": \"Quick Navigation\",                // Custom TOC title (default: \"Contents\")\n\n  // === OPERATIONAL DETAILS (MUST BE AN ARRAY) ===\n  \"operationalDetails\": [ ... ],                 // Main content sections\n  \"operationalDetailsTitleColor\": \"#FF7A18\",     // Title color (hex)\n  \"operationalDetailsBackgroundColor\": \"#1A2B3C\", // Section background (hex)\n\n  // === TOOLTIP DESCRIPTIONS (Objects with keys) ===\n  \"logicDescriptions\": { ... },\n  \"modeDescriptions\": { ... },\n  \"slotDescriptions\": { ... },\n  \"versionDescriptions\": { ... },\n  \"memoryDescriptions\": { ... }\n}\n\n================================================================================\nOPERATIONALDETAILS - ALL SUPPORTED PROPERTIES\n================================================================================\n\nEach item in the operationalDetails array can have these properties:\n\nBASIC CONTENT:\n  \"title\"           - (string) Section heading\n  \"description\"     - (string) Main text content with TMP rich text support\n  \"items\"           - (array of strings) Bullet list (rendered with • prefix)\n  \"steps\"           - (array of strings) Numbered list (rendered as 1. 2. 3.)\n  \"children\"        - (array) Nested OperationalDetail objects for sub-sections\n\nCOLLAPSIBLE SECTIONS:\n  \"collapsible\"     - (boolean) If true, renders as expandable/collapsible section\n                      Default: false (renders as inline text)\n\nTABLE OF CONTENTS:\n  \"tocId\"           - (string) Unique ID for TOC linking. When set:\n                      - Section appears in the Table of Contents\n                      - Clicking TOC link scrolls to this section\n                      - Works on both collapsible and non-collapsible sections\n\nMEDIA:\n  \"imageFile\"       - (string) Image filename in mod/images/ folder\n                      Supports: PNG, JPG, GIF (first frame only)\n  \"videoFile\"       - (string) Video filename in mod/images/ folder\n                      Supports: MP4. Renders as embedded video player\n  \"youtubeUrl\"      - (string) Full YouTube URL (e.g., \"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=...\")\n                      Renders as clickable link that opens in system browser\n  \"youtubeLabel\"    - (string) Custom label for YouTube link\n                      Default: \"Watch on YouTube\"\n\nSTYLING:\n  \"backgroundColor\" - (string) Custom hex color for this section's background\n                      Format: \"#RRGGBB\" (e.g., \"#1A2B3C\")\n\n================================================================================\nCOLLAPSIBLE VS INLINE CONTENT\n================================================================================\n\nCOLLAPSIBLE (collapsible: true):\n  - Renders as expandable StationpediaCategory with header bar\n  - User can click to expand/collapse\n  - Supports nested children that also render as collapsibles\n  - Best for: Long content, optional reading, nested documentation\n\nINLINE (collapsible: false or not set):\n  - Renders as regular text directly in the parent section\n  - Always visible, cannot be collapsed\n  - Best for: Short content, important notes, simple lists\n\nExample:\n{\n  \"title\": \"This is collapsible\",\n  \"collapsible\": true,\n  \"description\": \"User must click to see this content\"\n}\n\n{\n  \"title\": \"This is inline\",\n  \"description\": \"This content is always visible\"\n}\n\n================================================================================\nTABLE OF CONTENTS (TOC) SYSTEM\n================================================================================\n\nTo enable TOC for a device:\n\n1. Set \"generateToc\": true on the device entry\n2. Add \"tocId\" to each section you want in the TOC\n\nThe TOC panel:\n  - Appears at the top of Operational Details\n  - Shows clickable links to each tocId section\n  - Automatically uses multi-column layout (max 8 rows per column)\n  - Clicking a link scrolls to and expands that section\n\nExample:\n{\n  \"deviceKey\": \"ThingRobot\",\n  \"generateToc\": true,\n  \"tocTitle\": \"AIMeE Guide\",\n  \"operationalDetails\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Overview\",\n      \"tocId\": \"overview\",\n      \"collapsible\": true,\n      \"description\": \"Introduction to AIMeE...\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Modes\",\n      \"tocId\": \"modes\",\n      \"collapsible\": true,\n      \"children\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"Follow Mode\",\n          \"tocId\": \"mode-follow\",\n          \"collapsible\": true,\n          \"description\": \"AIMeE follows the player...\"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n\n================================================================================\nNESTING EXAMPLE (Deep Structure)\n================================================================================\n\n\"operationalDetails\": [\n  {\n    \"title\": \"Steel Smelting\",\n    \"tocId\": \"steel\",\n    \"collapsible\": true,\n    \"description\": \"The most common furnace recipe.\",\n    \"children\": [\n      {\n        \"title\": \"Requirements\",\n        \"tocId\": \"steel-requirements\",\n        \"collapsible\": true,\n        \"items\": [\n          \"Iron Ore + Coal Ore in 3:1 ratio\",\n          \"Temperature above 900K\",\n          \"Pressure above 100 kPa\"\n        ]\n      },\n      {\n        \"title\": \"Process\",\n        \"tocId\": \"steel-process\",\n        \"collapsible\": true,\n        \"steps\": [\n          \"Load iron ore and coal (3:1 ratio)\",\n          \"Add volatiles ice (fuel) and oxite ice (oxidizer)\",\n          \"Close the furnace door\",\n          \"Activate the furnace\",\n          \"Wait for Mode=1 or temperature 900K+\",\n          \"Collect ingots from export slot\"\n        ]\n      }\n    ]\n  },\n  {\n    \"title\": \"Tips\",\n    \"tocId\": \"tips\",\n    \"collapsible\": true,\n    \"items\": [\n      \"Furnace handles extreme pressures safely\",\n      \"On cold planets, use more fuel ice\",\n      \"Lock furnace via logic to prevent accidents\"\n    ]\n  }\n]\n\n================================================================================\nMEDIA EXAMPLES\n================================================================================\n\nIMAGE:\n{\n  \"title\": \"Wiring Diagram\",\n  \"imageFile\": \"furnace_wiring.png\",\n  \"description\": \"Connect power as shown above.\"\n}\n\nVIDEO (Embedded MP4):\n{\n  \"title\": \"Video Tutorial\",\n  \"collapsible\": true,\n  \"videoFile\": \"furnace_tutorial.mp4\",\n  \"description\": \"Watch the full smelting process.\"\n}\n\nYOUTUBE LINK:\n{\n  \"title\": \"External Tutorial\",\n  \"collapsible\": true,\n  \"youtubeUrl\": \"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ABC123\",\n  \"youtubeLabel\": \"Furnace Guide by StationeersGuru\",\n  \"description\": \"Watch a complete walkthrough.\"\n}\n\n================================================================================\nTEXTMESHPRO RICH TEXT FORMATTING\n================================================================================\n\nThe mod uses TextMeshPro for rendering. Supported tags:\n\nBASIC:\n  &lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;\n  &lt;i&gt;italic&lt;/i&gt;\n  &lt;u&gt;underline&lt;/u&gt;\n  &lt;s&gt;strikethrough&lt;/s&gt;\n\nCOLORS:\n  &lt;color=#FF0000&gt;hex color&lt;/color&gt;\n  &lt;color=red&gt;named color&lt;/color&gt;\n\nSIZE:\n  &lt;size=150%&gt;bigger&lt;/size&gt;\n  &lt;size=80%&gt;smaller&lt;/size&gt;\n  &lt;size=24&gt;24pt&lt;/size&gt;\n\nALIGNMENT:\n  &lt;align=center&gt;centered&lt;/align&gt;\n  &lt;align=right&gt;right-aligned&lt;/align&gt;\n\nINDENTATION:\n  &lt;indent=10%&gt;indented text&lt;/indent&gt;\n\nSUPER/SUBSCRIPT:\n  H&lt;sub&gt;2&lt;/sub&gt;O  →  H₂O\n  x&lt;sup&gt;2&lt;/sup&gt;   →  x²\n\nOTHER:\n  &lt;nobr&gt;no line break&lt;/nobr&gt;\n  &lt;lowercase&gt;LOWERCASE&lt;/lowercase&gt;\n  &lt;uppercase&gt;uppercase&lt;/uppercase&gt;\n\nLINE BREAKS:\n  Use \\n in JSON strings\n\n================================================================================\nTOOLTIP DESCRIPTIONS FORMAT\n================================================================================\n\nLOGIC DESCRIPTIONS:\n\"logicDescriptions\": {\n  \"Temperature\": {\n    \"dataType\": \"Float\",\n    \"range\": \"0+\",\n    \"description\": \"Internal temperature in Kelvin.\"\n  },\n  \"Mode\": {\n    \"dataType\": \"Integer\",\n    \"range\": \"0-5\",\n    \"description\": \"Current operational mode.\"\n  }\n}\n\nMODE DESCRIPTIONS:\n\"modeDescriptions\": {\n  \"Mode0\": {\n    \"modeValue\": \"0\",\n    \"description\": \"Device is idle/off.\"\n  },\n  \"Mode1\": {\n    \"modeValue\": \"1\",\n    \"description\": \"Standard operation.\"\n  }\n}\n\nSLOT DESCRIPTIONS:\n\"slotDescriptions\": {\n  \"InputSlot\": {\n    \"slotType\": \"Ore\",\n    \"description\": \"Accepts ore for processing.\"\n  }\n}\n\nVERSION DESCRIPTIONS:\n\"versionDescriptions\": {\n  \"Tier1\": {\n    \"description\": \"Basic model with limited capacity.\"\n  }\n}\n\nMEMORY DESCRIPTIONS:\n\"memoryDescriptions\": {\n  \"Setting\": {\n    \"opCode\": \"s\",\n    \"parameters\": \"value\",\n    \"description\": \"Stores configuration value.\",\n    \"byteLayout\": \"4 bytes\"\n  }\n}\n\n================================================================================\nGENERIC DESCRIPTIONS (Fallback)\n================================================================================\n\n\"genericDescriptions\": {\n  \"logic\": {\n    \"Power\": \"Device power state (0=off, 1=on)\",\n    \"Setting\": \"Configurable parameter value\"\n  },\n  \"slotTypes\": {\n    \"Ore\": \"Accepts raw ore items\"\n  },\n  \"slots\": {\n    \"InputSlot\": \"Primary input for materials\"\n  },\n  \"modes\": {\n    \"0\": \"Idle state\",\n    \"1\": \"Active state\"\n  },\n  \"versions\": {\n    \"Tier1\": \"Basic variant\"\n  },\n  \"connections\": {\n    \"Power\": \"Electrical power connection\"\n  },\n  \"memory\": {\n    \"Setting\": {\n      \"opCode\": \"s\",\n      \"parameters\": \"value\",\n      \"description\": \"Configuration storage\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"MaxPressure\": {\n      \"type\": \"Float\",\n      \"description\": \"Maximum pressure tolerance\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n================================================================================\nCOMPLETE DEVICE EXAMPLE\n================================================================================\n\n{\n  \"deviceKey\": \"ThingStructureFurnace\",\n  \"displayName\": \"Furnace\",\n  \"generateToc\": true,\n  \"tocTitle\": \"Furnace Guide\",\n  \"operationalDetailsTitleColor\": \"#FF7A18\",\n  \"logicDescriptions\": {\n    \"Temperature\": {\n      \"dataType\": \"Float\",\n      \"range\": \"0+\",\n      \"description\": \"Internal atmosphere temperature in Kelvin.\"\n    },\n    \"Mode\": {\n      \"dataType\": \"Integer\",\n      \"range\": \"0-1\",\n      \"description\": \"0=Invalid recipe, 1=Ready to smelt.\"\n    },\n    \"Activate\": {\n      \"dataType\": \"Boolean\",\n      \"range\": \"0-1\",\n      \"description\": \"Set to 1 to ignite furnace.\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"modeDescriptions\": {\n    \"Mode0\": {\n      \"modeValue\": \"0\",\n      \"description\": \"Invalid recipe or conditions not met.\"\n    },\n    \"Mode1\": {\n      \"modeValue\": \"1\",\n      \"description\": \"Valid recipe ready to smelt.\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"operationalDetails\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Overview\",\n      \"tocId\": \"overview\",\n      \"collapsible\": true,\n      \"description\": \"The Furnace smelts ores into ingots using combustion.\",\n      \"imageFile\": \"furnace_diagram.png\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Steel Smelting\",\n      \"tocId\": \"steel\",\n      \"collapsible\": true,\n      \"description\": \"The most common early-game recipe.\",\n      \"children\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"Requirements\",\n          \"tocId\": \"steel-reqs\",\n          \"collapsible\": true,\n          \"items\": [\n            \"Iron Ore (Fe) + Coal Ore in 3:1 ratio\",\n            \"Temperature above 900K\",\n            \"Pressure above 100 kPa\"\n          ]\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"Process\",\n          \"tocId\": \"steel-steps\",\n          \"collapsible\": true,\n          \"steps\": [\n            \"Load iron ore and coal (3:1)\",\n            \"Add volatiles + oxite ice\",\n            \"Close door and activate\",\n            \"Wait for Mode=1\",\n            \"Collect from export slot\"\n          ]\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Video Tutorial\",\n      \"tocId\": \"video\",\n      \"collapsible\": true,\n      \"youtubeUrl\": \"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EXAMPLE\",\n      \"youtubeLabel\": \"Furnace Tutorial\",\n      \"description\": \"Watch a complete walkthrough.\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"title\": \"Tips\",\n      \"tocId\": \"tips\",\n      \"collapsible\": true,\n      \"items\": [\n        \"&lt;b&gt;Won't activate:&lt;/b&gt; Ensure door is closed\",\n        \"&lt;b&gt;Mode=0:&lt;/b&gt; Check ore ratios\",\n        \"Use &lt;color=#FFA500&gt;ExportCount&lt;/color&gt; &gt; 0 for automation\"\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n\n================================================================================\nVALIDATION CHECKLIST\n================================================================================\n\nBefore submitting your JSON:\n\n[ ] deviceKey matches exact prefab name (e.g., \"ThingStructureFurnace\")\n[ ] operationalDetails is an ARRAY with square brackets []\n[ ] Each collapsible section has \"collapsible\": true\n[ ] tocId values are unique within the device\n[ ] generateToc is set to true if using tocId entries\n[ ] Rich text tags are properly closed\n[ ] Image/video files exist in mod/images/ folder\n[ ] YouTube URLs are full URLs (not shortened)\n[ ] JSON is valid (no trailing commas, proper brackets)\n[ ] Nesting depth is reasonable (2-3 levels max recommended)\n\n================================================================================\nCOMMON MISTAKES TO AVOID\n================================================================================\n\nWRONG - operationalDetails as object:\n  \"operationalDetails\": { \"title\": \"...\" }\n\nCORRECT - operationalDetails as array:\n  \"operationalDetails\": [ { \"title\": \"...\" } ]\n\nWRONG - Missing collapsible for expandable sections:\n  { \"title\": \"Section\", \"children\": [...] }\n\nCORRECT - Explicit collapsible:\n  { \"title\": \"Section\", \"collapsible\": true, \"children\": [...] }\n\nWRONG - tocId without generateToc:\n  \"operationalDetails\": [ { \"tocId\": \"section1\" } ]\n\nCORRECT - Enable TOC first:\n  \"generateToc\": true,\n  \"operationalDetails\": [ { \"tocId\": \"section1\" } ]\n\n================================================================================\nEND OF INSTRUCTIONS\n================================================================================\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

{
  "invocationMessage": "Using \"Replace String in File\"",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\n📋 New JSON Schema Features\r\nNew properties for building rich, interactive documentation:\r\n\r\n**Device-Level Properties:**\r\n- &#96;generateToc&#96; - (boolean) Enable Table of Contents panel at top of Operational Details\r\n- &#96;tocTitle&#96; - (string) Custom title for TOC panel (default: \"Contents\")\r\n- &#96;operationalDetailsBackgroundColor&#96; - (string) Hex color for section backgrounds\r\n\r\n**OperationalDetail Properties:**\r\n- &#96;collapsible&#96; - (boolean) Render as expandable/collapsible section with header bar\r\n- &#96;tocId&#96; - (string) Unique ID for TOC linking; clicking scrolls to section\r\n- &#96;imageFile&#96; - (string) Display inline image from mod/images/ folder\r\n- &#96;videoFile&#96; - (string) Embed MP4 video player from mod/images/ folder\r\n- &#96;youtubeUrl&#96; - (string) Clickable YouTube link that opens in browser\r\n- &#96;youtubeLabel&#96; - (string) Custom label for YouTube link\r\n- &#96;backgroundColor&#96; - (string) Custom hex color for individual section\r\n\r\n### 🎨 Vanilla Mode Default &amp; Easter Egg Toggle\r\n- **Vanilla by Default** - Mod now starts in vanilla Stationpedia styling mode\r\n- **Header Toggle** - Click the \"Stationpedia\" header to toggle Ascended mode (easter egg)\r\n- **Visual Feedback** - Header changes to \"Stationpedia Ascended\" with orange styling when enabled\r\n- **Icon Swap** - Custom phoenix icon only appears in Ascended mode\r\n- **Removed Book Button** - Simplified UI by removing the mode toggle button\r\n\r\n### 🔧 Bug Fixes\r\n- **Fixed JSON Syntax Error** - Resolved corrupted line in descriptions.json that broke tooltip parsing\r\n- **Fixed Brace Mismatch** - Corrected code structure issues in icon replacement logic\r\n\r\n### 📝 New Files\r\n- &#96;VanillaModeManager.cs&#96; - Static manager for vanilla/ascended mode state\r\n- &#96;CategoryHeaderHandler.cs&#96; - Handler for category header interactions\r\n- &#96;LLM_INSTRUCTIONS.txt&#96; - Completely rewritten documentation for JSON schema\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n",
  "textEditContent": "📋 New JSON Schema Features\r\nNew properties for building rich, interactive documentation:\r\n\r\n**Device-Level Properties:**\r\n- &#96;generateToc&#96; - (boolean) Enable Table of Contents panel at top of Operational Details\r\n- &#96;tocTitle&#96; - (string) Custom title for TOC panel (default: \"Contents\")\r\n- &#96;operationalDetailsBackgroundColor&#96; - (string) Hex color for section backgrounds\r\n\r\n**OperationalDetail Properties:**\r\n- &#96;collapsible&#96; - (boolean) Render as expandable/collapsible section with header bar\r\n- &#96;tocId&#96; - (string) Unique ID for TOC linking; clicking scrolls to section\r\n- &#96;imageFile&#96; - (string) Display inline image from mod/images/ folder\r\n- &#96;videoFile&#96; - (string) Embed MP4 video player from mod/images/ folder\r\n- &#96;youtubeUrl&#96; - (string) Clickable YouTube link that opens in browser\r\n- &#96;youtubeLabel&#96; - (string) Custom label for YouTube link\r\n- &#96;backgroundColor&#96; - (string) Custom hex color for individual section\r\n\r\n### 🎨 Vanilla Mode Default &amp; Easter Egg Toggle\r\n- **Vanilla by Default** - Mod now starts in vanilla Stationpedia styling mode\r\n- **Header Toggle** - Click the \"Stationpedia\" header to toggle Ascended mode (easter egg)\r\n- **Visual Feedback** - Header changes to \"Stationpedia Ascended\" with orange styling when enabled\r\n- **Icon Swap** - Custom phoenix icon only appears in Ascended mode\r\n- **Removed Book Button** - Simplified UI by removing the mode toggle button\r\n\r\n### 🔧 Bug Fixes\r\n- **Fixed JSON Syntax Error** - Resolved corrupted line in descriptions.json that broke tooltip parsing\r\n- **Fixed Brace Mismatch** - Corrected code structure issues in icon replacement logic\r\n\r\n### 📝 New Files\r\n- &#96;VanillaModeManager.cs&#96; - Static manager for vanilla/ascended mode state\r\n- &#96;CategoryHeaderHandler.cs&#96; - Handler for category header interactions\r\n- &#96;LLM_INSTRUCTIONS.txt&#96; - Completely rewritten documentation for JSON schema",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

</details>

Structure\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\r\n{\r\n  \"deviceKey\": \"ThingStructureFurnace\",\r\n  \"displayName\": \"Furnace\",\r\n  \r\n  \"generateToc\": true,\r\n  \"tocTitle\": \"Furnace Guide\",\r\n  \r\n  \"pageDescription\": \"Replaces entire description\",\r\n  \"pageDescriptionAppend\": \"Added to end\",\r\n  \"pageDescriptionPrepend\": \"Added to beginning\",\r\n  \r\n  \"operationalDetailsTitleColor\": \"#FF7A18\",\r\n  \"operationalDetailsBackgroundColor\": \"#1A2B3C\",\r\n  \r\n  \"operationalDetails\": [ ... ],\r\n  \"logicDescriptions\": { ... },\r\n  \"modeDescriptions\": { ... },\r\n  \"slotDescriptions\": { ... }\r\n}\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n#### Operational Details Properties\r\nEach section in &#96;operationalDetails&#96; supports:\r\n\r\n| Property | Type | Description |\r\n|----------|------|-------------|\r\n| &#96;title&#96; | string | Section heading |\r\n| &#96;description&#96; | string | Main text content (supports TMP rich text) |\r\n| &#96;items&#96; | array | Bullet list (• prefix) |\r\n| &#96;steps&#96; | array | Numbered list (1. 2. 3.) |\r\n| &#96;children&#96; | array | Nested sub-sections |\r\n| &#96;collapsible&#96; | boolean | Make section expandable/collapsible |\r\n| &#96;tocId&#96; | string | ID for Table of Contents linking |\r\n| &#96;imageFile&#96; | string | Image from mod/images/ folder |\r\n| &#96;videoFile&#96; | string | Embedded MP4 video player |\r\n| &#96;youtubeUrl&#96; | string | Clickable YouTube link |\r\n| &#96;youtubeLabel&#96; | string | Custom YouTube link text |\r\n|
